hero.title: The Evolution of
hero.subtitle: We build AI agents with <1>persistent memory</1> and <1>deterministic logic</1>. Powered by Vertex AI and protected by the <2>Ouroboros Protocol</2>.

services.title: Digital Workforce with
services.subtitle: We don't build chatbots. We build autonomous agents that operate with the precision of a defense system.

items.title: Sales & Conversion Agents
items.subtitle: Agent "Luna" — Autonomous Sales 24/7
items.description: Agents like Luna handle DMs on Instagram and WhatsApp, check real availability in Aurora V2 databases, and close sales without human intervention. Intelligent conversion pipeline with automatic follow-up.

items.title: Ops & Workflow Automation
items.subtitle: Industrial-Grade Automation
items.description: End-to-end internal process automation, from HR to risk management. Native AWS Lambda integration with legacy systems to orchestrate complex flows with no single point of failure.

items.title: AI Architecture Consulting
items.subtitle: AI System Design & Audit
items.description: Computable specifications design and full audit of existing AI systems for companies scaling up. We turn fragile architectures into resilient infrastructure.

ouroboros.title: Ouroboros
ouroboros.subtitle: A development cycle where AI designs, programs, and audits itself. Adversarial QA to ensure zero errors in production.

steps.title: Crystallization
steps.subtitle: Living Specifications
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, we create computable specifications that act as verifiable contracts. The system knows exactly what it must do, with no ambiguity.

steps.title: Swarm
steps.subtitle: Parallel Development
steps.description: Specialized agents work in parallel on different system modules. Each agent is an expert in its domain, maximizing speed without sacrificing quality.

steps.title: Adversarial Audit
steps.subtitle: Autonomous Red Teamer
steps.description: A "Red Teamer" agent systematically attacks every component before production. It finds vulnerabilities, edge cases, and failure points that no human team would catch in time.

steps.title: Cognitive Memory
steps.subtitle: Continuous Learning
steps.description: The system learns from every interaction via RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and persistent logs. Each cycle makes the system smarter and more resilient.

techStack.title: Enterprise-Class
techStack.subtitle: Every component in our stack is chosen for maximum reliability, scalability, and performance.

items.name: Vertex AI
items.subtitle: Google Cloud
items.description: AI engine for inference, fine-tuning, and agent orchestration.

items.name: AWS Lambda
items.subtitle: Serverless
items.description: Serverless functions for event-driven execution with automatic scaling.

items.name: Aurora V2
items.subtitle: PostgreSQL
items.description: High-availability relational database with microsecond reads.

items.name: Node.js
items.subtitle: Backend
items.description: Runtime for low-latency microservices and real-time APIs.

items.name: RAG Pipeline
items.subtitle: Cognitive Memory
items.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for dynamic context and continuous learning.

trust.title: Enterprise Data
trust.subtitle: Industrial-grade security and minimal latency. Your AI infrastructure, locked down.
trust.banner: Ouroboros Protocol includes Adversarial QA on every deployment. Zero production errors isn't a promise — it's an architectural guarantee.

items.title: End-to-End Encryption
items.description: Data in transit and at rest protected with AES-256 and TLS 1.3.

items.title: Continuous Auditing
items.description: Immutable logs of every agent action for full compliance.

items.title: Isolated Infrastructure
items.description: Dedicated VPC with zero-trust networking and network segmentation.

items.title: Minimal Latency
items.description: Edge computing with global CDN for sub-50ms responses.

items.title: SOC 2 Ready
items.description: Architecture designed to meet the most demanding standards.

items.title: 99.99% Availability
items.description: Multi-AZ with automatic failover and disaster recovery.

cta.title: Ready to deploy your
cta.paragraph: Schedule a free architecture audit. We analyze your current infrastructure and design the roadmap to operational autonomy.
